type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Usage decrease due to an Enzyme trial .  Less Sulphuric acid was added to the process to lower the pH of the mash entering fermentation because no ammonia was being added in the process.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Usage decrease due to Avantec Enzyme Trial.  The Avantec enzyme eliminates the use of ammonia by functioning in a less restrictive pH range which meant no ammonia was used during the trial.

comments.comment: A lesser quantity was used due to an enzime trial, which resulted in a smaller quantity released for water treatment.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: This is the first year that benzene has been reported.  The reason is that new information regarding the ingredients of gasoline was obtained from updated MSDS.  This resulted in needing to include benzene.  It also caused significant increased usage estimates for toluene, and removed xylene as a reportable contaminant since the updated ingredients list did not contain xylene.

comments.comment: Monthly effluent samples indicated increased concentration in August.  This measurement appears to be an anomaly and may reflect a measurement error, but has been included none the less.
